issues.name: acli-jira-subcommand-syntax
issues.title: Used incorrect acli --action flag syntax instead of subcommand-based syntax
issues.description: The assistant attempted 'acli jira --action getIssueList' which failed with 'unknown flag: --action'. The acli CLI uses a modern subcommand pattern: 'acli jira workitem search --jql <query> --fields <fields>'. This caused a command failure and required iterative troubleshooting to discover the correct pattern.
